mapper.sql: id , user_id, asset_id, quantity, avg_cost, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE user_holding SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE user_holding
user_id = #{entity.userId}, asset_id = #{entity.assetId}, quantity = #{entity.quantity}, avg_cost = #{entity.avgCost}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{entity.id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_holding WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT
FROM user_holding WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
